support.detail: No CEO-irreplaceable lever: budget already approved (2 Oct 2025), no blocked discount, no roadmap ask, presales not gating, no buyer-CEO peer relationship required.
support.why_not_vp: Everything outstanding - map the economic buyer above David (the Global Head of Procurement), re-engage champion David GALLO, and refresh the iSaaS Lite vs Advanced integration quotes - is standard account-team work a CRO/VP could run; nothing needs the CEO personally.

monitor.reason: Large 250k formal-evaluation deal has gone silent for 31 days and the expected April tender still has not opened.

triggers.summary: 250k Forbo tender deal gone quiet 31 days; the April tender never opened.
triggers.detail: Forbo Flooring Systems is a 250k (is_large) opportunity in Formal Evaluation (win 40.6) with a strong champion (David GALLO) who shaped a two-vendor tender in Zycus's favour, but it has produced zero activity, movement, or call in the last 14 days and 31 days since any touch. The buyer's own tender - expected to start April 2026 (due 2026-04-30) - has still not surfaced and the deal is now drifting into July with no re-engagement of David since 7 Nov 2025. If left unwatched, a 250k deal built on 12 months of requirement shaping goes cold right before the competitive tender opens, letting Ivalua close the engagement gap.
triggers.metric: 31 days since last activity; 0 activities/calls/movements in 14 days; tender ~2 months overdue (expected Apr 2026)
triggers.ceo_ask: Ask Caroline why a 250k Forbo deal has had no touch in 31 days, whether the April tender has actually launched, and when David GALLO was last re-engaged.
triggers.evidence: days_since_last_activity=31; recent_movements_14d, recent_activities_14d and recent_calls_14d all empty as of 2026-07-06; next_step_updated_in_window=false; buyer_dependent_items: 'Issue the tender and share its timeline and requirements to Zycus' due 2026-04-30 still not issued.
